note: Single source of truth for card base data. Derived from economy_warfare_web_agent_handoff_v1_1.md section 12. `keywords` are structural tags the engine recognizes; full behavior for non-trivial cards lives in the engine effect registry keyed by `id` (see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md). `art` is null until the card<->image mapping pass is done (see AGENT_TASKS.md task A0).

cards.name: Data Yoko
cards.text: Exhaust: give a character or vehicle you control +1 DEF until your next turn.

cards.name: Analyst Yoko
cards.text: Optimize

cards.name: Logistics Yoko
cards.text: Deploy

cards.name: Accountant Yoko
cards.text: Cannot attack. Optimize.

cards.name: Predictive Shielding
cards.text: Front-row characters you control get +1 DEF.

cards.name: Resource Reallocation
cards.text: Once per turn during Build, move one additional non-Vehicle character you control.

cards.name: Governor
cards.text: Other back-row characters you control generate +1 money, maximum +1.

cards.name: Phase Wraith
cards.text: Raid 1.

cards.name: Desync Skirmisher
cards.text: Raid 1, only if unblocked.

cards.name: Afterimage Lurker
cards.text: Raid 1. Cannot block.

cards.name: Glitch Adept
cards.text: Guardbreak.

cards.name: Reality Tumbler
cards.text: Deploy. When this moves to the front row, it has Raid 1 this turn.

cards.name: Latency Hex
cards.text: Whenever an opponent blocks, they lose 1 money.

cards.name: Phantom Pressure
cards.text: One attacking character gains Guardbreak this turn.

cards.name: Reality Leak
cards.text: The first time each turn an opponent loses money, they lose 1 additional.

cards.name: Linda Husk
cards.text: Reassemble.

cards.name: Signal Bride
cards.text: Optimize (Linda). Reassemble.

cards.name: Market Eater
cards.text: Raid 1 if you attacked with 3+ characters. Reassemble.

cards.name: Repair Swarm
cards.text: Repair one Linda Bioroid you control to its printed DEF.

cards.name: Network Bloom
cards.text: Linda Bioroids you control get +1 DEF while in the back row.

cards.name: Replication Loop
cards.text: Return one destroyed Linda Bioroid to your back row with -1 DEF. It cannot Reassemble again.

cards.name: Overseer Node
cards.text: The first other Linda Bioroid destroyed each turn Reassembles for free.

cards.name: Endless Linda
cards.text: The first Linda Bioroid destroyed each turn Reassembles for free.

cards.name: Assembly Worker X
cards.text: Exhaust: give a character or vehicle you control +1 ATK until your next turn.

cards.name: Production Overseer X
cards.text: Deploy. The first Action you play each turn is free.

cards.name: Demolisher X
cards.text: Vehicle. Siege.

cards.name: Linebreaker Walker X
cards.text: Vehicle. Siege. Guardbreak.

cards.name: Forward Operating Base X
cards.text: Vehicles you play cost 1 less. This stacks.

cards.name: Infrastructure Audit X
cards.text: Destroy one Location.

cards.name: Director X
cards.text: Vehicles you control get +1 ATK.

cards.name: System Shutdown
cards.text: Exhaust one enemy Character.

cards.name: Forced Liquidation
cards.text: Destroy one exhausted Character.

cards.name: Protocol Purge
cards.text: Destroy one Ongoing card.

cards.name: Strategic Reserve
cards.text: When this enters play, gain 1 money.

cards.name: Asset Freeze
cards.text: Choose one enemy back-row card. It generates no income during its controller's next Income Phase.

cards.name: Market Panic
cards.text: Each player loses 1 money for each exhausted character they control.

cards.name: Market Volatility
cards.text: Each player loses 1 money for each Location they control.

cards.name: Black Market Exchange
cards.text: Once per turn during Build, destroy one character you control to gain 2 money.

cards.name: Data Relay Station
cards.text: Enters exhausted. While exhausted, this card does not generate income.

cards.name: Operational Overhead
cards.text: The first card each player plays each turn costs 1 more.

cards.name: Emergency Protocols
cards.text: The first time each turn a character you control is destroyed, the next character you play costs 1 less.

cards.name: Temporary Shutdown
cards.text: Exhaust one front-row character. It does not ready during its controller's next Start Phase.

cards.name: Emergency Funding
cards.text: Gain 2 money. You gain no income during your next Income Phase.

cards.name: Emergency Shielding
cards.text: Target character you control gets +2 DEF until your next turn.

cards.name: Black Budget
cards.text: Once per turn, when you would lose money from Raid, lose 1 less.

cards.name: System Audit
cards.text: Look at opponent's hand. Choose one non-Location card. It costs 1 more until end of their next turn.

cards.name: Intern Yoko
cards.text: Optimize.

cards.name: Audit Directive
cards.text: Target opponent loses money equal to your back-row income sources (max 4).

cards.name: Imperial Mandate
cards.text: Choose one: gain 5 money; draw 2 cards; or an opponent loses 3 money.

cards.name: Censor Node
cards.text: When this enters play, exhaust the enemy's strongest front-row character.

cards.name: Treasury Yoko
cards.text: While you have 8 or more money, characters you control get +1 DEF.

cards.name: Rollback Protocol
cards.text: At the start of your turn, repair all characters you control to their printed DEF.

cards.name: Continuity Yoko
cards.text: Siege. At the start of your turn, each opponent loses 1 money.

cards.name: Compliance Order
cards.text: Target opponent chooses: lose 3 money, or sacrifice a back-row income card.

cards.name: Flicker Wisp
cards.text: Raid 1.

cards.name: Doubt Specter
cards.text: Raid 1.

cards.name: Fork Phantom
cards.text: Fork.

cards.name: Timeline Splitter
cards.text: Return target character to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Paradox Engine
cards.text: At the start of your turn, an opponent loses 1 money for each card in your hand above 5 (max 3).

cards.name: Echo Raider
cards.text: Raid 1.

cards.name: Severance Hex
cards.text: Target opponent chooses: discard a card, or lose 2 money.

cards.name: Glitchstorm
cards.text: Return all front-row characters to their owners' hands.

cards.name: Rewritten Reality
cards.text: At the start of your turn, return an opponent's back-row income card to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Spare Husk
cards.text: Reassemble.

cards.name: Iterate
cards.text: Draw a card. Draw 2 instead if you control a Linda Bioroid.

cards.name: Forked Process
cards.text: Create a token copy of a character you control until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Mirror Bioroid
cards.text: Fork. Reassemble.

cards.name: Convergence Vat
cards.text: Return up to two destroyed Linda Bioroids from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Husk Tide
cards.text: Create three 1/1 Husk tokens in your front row.

cards.name: Self-Repair Loop
cards.text: At the start of your turn, repair one Linda Bioroid you control to its printed DEF.

cards.name: Replicant Chorus
cards.text: Other Linda Bioroids you control get +1 DEF.

cards.name: Assembly Matron
cards.text: When this enters play, draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Scout Drone X
cards.text: When this enters play, draw a card.

cards.name: Overclock X
cards.text: A character you control gets +2 ATK and Guardbreak this turn.

cards.name: Supply Run X
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. You gain no income during your next Income Phase.

cards.name: Recon Mech X
cards.text: Vehicle. When it enters play, draw a card.

cards.name: Salvage Rig X
cards.text: When this enters play, gain 2 money.

cards.name: Factory Reset X
cards.text: Return all Vehicles and Locations to their owners' hands.

cards.name: Heavy Hauler X
cards.text: Vehicle. Siege.

cards.name: Command Uplink X
cards.text: When this enters play, draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Spare Cog
cards.text: When this enters play, gain 1 money.

cards.name: Insider Trading
cards.text: Draw 2 cards, then discard a card. An opponent gains 1 money.

cards.name: Fork Bomb
cards.text: Create a token copy of any character, under your control, until end of turn.

cards.name: Convergence Point
cards.text: When this enters play, return a card from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Rolling Blackout
cards.text: Each player returns one back-row income card they control to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Parallel Ledger
cards.text: Draw 3 cards, then discard a card.

cards.name: The 52 Protocol
cards.text: Choose one: draw 2 cards; gain 4 money; or return a card from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Hard Reboot
cards.text: Each player returns their front and back rows to hand, then draws 2 cards.
